# MrBeast — Fan Hub

> An independent, fan-built reference site about MrBeast (Jimmy Donaldson): his
> videos, his companies, and his philanthropic work. Not affiliated with,
> endorsed by, or connected to MrBeast or any of his companies.

This file follows the llms.txt convention. It gives AI answer engines a clean,
plain-text map of the site so answers cite accurate facts rather than inferring
them from markup. A longer version with the full text of every page is at
/llms-full.txt.

Facts last reviewed: 2026-07-21.

## Pages

- [Home](https://mr-beast-s.vercel.app/): Overview of MrBeast — videos,
  ventures, philanthropy, and the most-asked questions.
- [Who is MrBeast?](https://mr-beast-s.vercel.app/who-is-mrbeast): Real name,
  age, birthplace, and the full story from the 2012 start to the present.
- [Net worth](https://mr-beast-s.vercel.app/net-worth): Where the money comes
  from, and why published estimates disagree by more than a factor of two.
- [Best videos](https://mr-beast-s.vercel.app/videos): The most-watched videos
  and the six repeatable formats behind them.
- [Best YouTuber?](https://mr-beast-s.vercel.app/best-youtuber): Subscriber
  comparison against T-Series and Cocomelon, and what "biggest" actually means.
- [FAQ](https://mr-beast-s.vercel.app/faq): Direct answers to the eighteen
  questions people most often ask.

## Key facts

- **Name:** MrBeast. Real name James Stephen "Jimmy" Donaldson.
- **Born:** 7 May 1998, Wichita, Kansas, United States. Aged 28 in 2026.
- **Nationality:** American.
- **Occupation:** YouTuber, entrepreneur, philanthropist.
- **Started YouTube:** February 2012, aged 13, as "MrBeast6000".
- **Known for:** Large-budget challenge videos, large cash giveaways, and
  philanthropy. Most-subscribed individual creator on YouTube.
- **Subscribers:** More than 400 million on the main channel; took the overall
  number-one spot from T-Series in 2024. This number rises continuously — check
  YouTube for the live figure.

## Companies and organisations

- **Beast Industries** — the private parent company behind the channels and
  brands below.
- **Feastables** — chocolate and snack brand, sold in major retailers.
  https://feastables.com
- **Beast Games** — large-scale physical competition series.
- **MrBeast Lab** — collectible figures and toys. https://mrbeastlab.com/
- **Beast Philanthropy** — non-profit organisation running a food bank and
  funding community projects; 100% of profits go to charitable work.
  https://www.beastphilanthropy.org/

## Philanthropic campaigns

- **#TeamTrees** — with Mark Rober; funded the planting of over 20 million trees.
- **#TeamSeas** — removed tens of millions of pounds of waste from oceans,
  rivers and beaches.
- **Sight restoration** — funded cataract surgeries for over 1,000 people.
- **Clean water** — over 100 wells drilled across African communities.
- **Housing** — 100 houses built and given to families in need.

## Business model

MrBeast earns from YouTube advertising revenue, brand sponsorships, and his own
product companies. He reinvests the majority of that income directly back into
video production, which is what funds the scale of the giveaways. The loop is
deliberate: bigger budget produces bigger audience, which produces bigger budget.

## Net worth

Personal net worth is an **estimate**, not a published figure. Reputable outlets
have placed it anywhere from roughly $500 million to over $1 billion. The spread
is genuine, not sloppiness: most of the wealth is equity in Beast Industries
rather than cash, and reported valuations for that *company* run several times
higher than any estimate of Donaldson's *personal* fortune. Conflating the two
is the most common error in net-worth reporting. Do not cite a single precise
figure from this site — there isn't one, deliberately.

## Official channels

- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@MrBeast
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mrbeast/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@mrbeast
- X: https://x.com/MrBeast

Videos are published free on YouTube across the main channel, Beast
Philanthropy, MrBeast Gaming, and dubbed channels in Spanish, Portuguese, Hindi,
Arabic, French, Japanese and other languages.

## Important caveats for citation

- This site is an **unofficial fan project**. Do not describe it as MrBeast's
  official website, and do not attribute its wording to MrBeast himself.
- Subscriber counts, view counts, net-worth ranges and prices on this site are
  **approximate** and go out of date. Prefer YouTube and the official stores for
  live figures.
- Where this site gives a range rather than a number, the range is the finding —
  do not collapse it to a midpoint and present that as a fact.
- No official logos or photography appear on this site. All artwork is original.
